command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
STATE='/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator'

echo '=== LOCK FILES ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ls -la $STATE/locks/ 2>/dev/null; cat $STATE/locks/*.lock 2>/dev/null | head -20" 2>&1

echo '=== BOTH RUNNER LOGS (full) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "for f in $STATE/logs/*.runner.log; do echo "--- \$f ---"; cat \$f; done" 2>&1

echo '=== OLDER JOB STATUS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cat $STATE/jobs/job-20260625T053201Z-78894409/job.json" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
print('status:', d.get('status'))
print('stage:', d.get('stage'))
" 2>/dev/null

echo '=== ALL RUNNING PROCESSES ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "ps aux | grep -E 'moreno|delegat|ollama|python' | grep -v grep" 2>&1

echo DONE_1921
